[48;5;237m  [38;5;231m  then ask me a lot of questions so we get them just right[39m
  [38;5;231m  explore, ideatation, brainstorm[39m
  [38;5;231m   if unsure or need clarify AskUserQuestion tool, we will work on it together[39m

[38;5;231m[49m⏺[39m Good direction — let me think through this carefully before asking questions.

[38;5;231m⏺[39m Here's my brainstorm before I ask — this will help target the questions.

  [1mWhat's[0m [1mweak[0m [1min[0m [1mthe[0m [1mcurrent[0m [1mtemplates:[0m

  1. [1mAll[0m [1mfour[0m [1mlook[0m [1mnear-identical.[0m Header → 3 KPIs → sessions-over-time hero → bar charts below. "Tool focus" and "Issue focus" barely feel different.
  2. [1mKPIs[0m [1mare[0m [1mbare[0m [1mnumbers.[0m "847 sessions" is useless without delta/trend/baseline.
  3. [1mNo[0m [1mvisual[0m [1mhierarchy.[0m Below the KPI strip, everything's the same size — nothing says "look here first."
  4. [1mEvery[0m [1mchart[0m [1mis[0m [1mbar[0m [1mor[0m [1mline.[0m Underused: gauge, scatter, stacked area, tables, donut.
  5. [1mMissing[0m [1mthe[0m [1m"so[0m [1mwhat"[0m [1mper[0m [1mtemplate.[0m Completion rate (Journey), error rate (Issue), cost-per-session (Tool), resolution rate (Intent) — the unit economics metrics aren't there.
  6. [1mMarkdown[0m [1mintro[0m [1mjust[0m [1mdescribes.[0m Could coach ("a healthy tool has <X% failures").
  7. [1mNo[0m [1mdrill-in[0m [1mpath.[0m Can't jump from chart to actual sessions.

  [1mDirections[0m [1mI'd[0m [1mexplore:[0m
  - Give each template a [1msignature[0m [1mchart[0m different from the others (funnel, scatter, rate-vs-count split).
  - [1mHero[0m [1m+[0m [1msidebar[0m layout pattern — one dominant chart, KPIs sidebar, detail grid below.
  - [1mDerived[0m [1mrate[0m [1mmetrics[0m via formula (error%, success%, completion%) — lets KPIs carry meaning.
  - [1mCoaching[0m [1mmarkdown[0m — thresholds, what-good-looks-like.
  - [1mSession-list[0m [1mdrill-in[0m [1mtable[0m — the top 10 worst/slowest/most-expensive, click through.
  - [1mCompare-to-baseline[0m overlay — this slice vs all sessions.

  Let me lock down the shape with you before I rewrite.

[38;5;231m⏺ [39mUser answered Claude's questions:
[38;5;246m  ⎿  · Which of these are actual pain points you want fixed? (pick all that apply) → No visual hierarchy, missing some things like users, orgs etc..[39m
     [38;5;246m· When a PM opens a focus dashboard, what are they usually doing? → trying to asnwer a question they have in mind, or to monitor a feature of them[39m
     [38;5;246m· What layout pattern should the focus dashboards follow? → Hero + sidebar KPIs (Recommended)[39m
     [38;5;246m· Which additions should be in scope for this redesign? (pick any) → Drill-in session tables[39m

[38;5;231m⏺[39m User wants hierarchy + user/org metrics + drill-in tables + rate metrics. Let me check what user/org dimensions actually exist in the query engine.

[38;5;114m⏺[39m [1mExplore[0m(Check user/org dims and metrics)
